recommendations.title: Homecoming
recommendations.overview: A jilted ex-girlfriend plots revenge after her former beau comes back to their hometown with a new lover.

recommendations.title: Sleeping Dogs

recommendations.title: American Psycho II: All American Girl
recommendations.overview: Rachel is a criminology student hoping to land a position as a teacher's assistant for professor Robert Starkman. She's sure this position will pave the way to an FBI career, and she's willing to do anything to obtain it -- including killing her clas

recommendations.title: 40 Acres
recommendations.overview: Hailey Freeman and her family are the last descendants of African American farmers who settled in rural Canada after the Civil War. In a famine-decimated near future, they now struggle to safeguard their farm, as they make one last stand against a vi

recommendations.title: As Good as It Gets
recommendations.overview: A misanthropic author, a single mother and waitress, and a gay artist form an unlikely friendship after the artist is assaulted in a robbery.

recommendations.title: The Aura
recommendations.overview: A quiet, epileptic taxidermist plans the perfect crime. All he needs is the right opportunity. An accident, perhaps…

recommendations.title: Better Days
recommendations.overview: A bullied teenage girl forms an unlikely friendship with a mysterious young man who protects her from her assailants, while she copes with the pressures of her final examinations.

recommendations.title: Hurricane Bianca
recommendations.overview: A teacher from New York moves to a small town in Texas, gets fired for being gay, and returns disguised in drag to get revenge on the people who were nasty to him.

recommendations.title: Speak

recommendations.title: The Snows of Kilimanjaro
recommendations.overview: A union pensioner and his wife are robbed, but find that merely getting the assailants brought to justice is not enough for their consciences.
